House of Commons Debate

15 March 2026

The Prime Minister (Sir Keir Starmer)

Mr Speaker, I beg to move that this House supports the Government's industrial strategy.

"This Government will deliver on its promise to invest £28 billion in clean energy by the end of this Parliament," the Prime Minister said.

"We voted to triple onshore wind capacity, and we will see that promise through," he continued.

The House divided on the motion. The Prime Minister voted in favour of the Industrial Strategy Bill, second reading.
